title: Wire local task store into the Orchestrator workflow
description: Until the Atlassian MCP server is provisioned, the Orchestrator must read tickets from `tasks/*.json` instead of Jira. Add a thin adapter so the rest of the workflow (Researcher, Developer, Reviewer hand-offs, status transitions, comment appending) is unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: Orchestrator can list all tasks where status == 'todo' from the local store.
Orchestrator can transition a task's status and persist the change to its JSON file with an updated `updated_at` timestamp.
Orchestrator can append a comment to a task with author, ISO-8601 timestamp, and markdown body.
`index.json` is regenerated from per-task files after any write.

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Picked up after TASK-004 closed. No research needed — adapter is thin file I/O on top of `src/atomic-write.js` and the existing `tasks/schema.json`. Workflow: developer writes failing Vitest suite covering all 4 ACs, then implements `src/task-store.js`, then reviewer audits in fresh context.

comments.author: orchestrator
comments.body: Closed. Workflow complete: tests-first commit `5619336` (11 failing specs in `tests/task-store.spec.js`, all MODULE_NOT_FOUND for the right reason), implementation commit `9bfb956` (`src/task-store.js` + additive `atomicWriteFiles` two-phase primitive in `src/atomic-write.js`), reviewer audit in fresh context returned **APPROVE** (0 HIGH, 0 MEDIUM, 5 LOW, 2 NIT). 43/43 vitest passing in ~3s. AC coverage map: AC1 (list todos) — `list_todos_returns_only_status_todo`, `list_todos_empty_store`, `list_todos_ignores_index_json`; AC2 (transition status) — `transition_status_writes_new_status_and_bumps_updated_at`, `transition_status_rejects_invalid_status`, `transition_status_rejects_unknown_key`, `transition_status_regenerates_index_after_write`; AC3 (append comment) — `append_comment_pushes_well_formed_object`, `append_comment_preserves_existing_comments`, `append_comment_bumps_updated_at_and_regenerates_index`; AC4 (index regen) — covered jointly by the two `*_regenerates_index_*` tests plus the `writes_go_through_atomic_write` syscall-ordering assertion. Reviewer independently round-tripped `appendComment` output through ajv against `tasks/schema.json` — VALID. The 5 LOWs (partial-commit window in `atomicWriteFiles`, TOCTOU between `readAllTasks` and write, no recovery sweeper for `tasks/*.tmp.*`, `listTodos` ignores `depends_on`, no defensive ajv on read) carried over to **TASK-009**.
